resources.string: FormReady checks measurable upload requirements against the file you actually export.
Processing stays on this device. Files go only where you choose.
Exact pixels, format, dimensions, DPI and file-size requirements.
Clean, crop and fit a signature without stretching its strokes.
Inspect page and size requirements before choosing a compatible export.

FormReady is an independent file-preparation utility and is not affiliated with any government, examination body, employer, or application portal. Always confirm the destination’s current requirements.
No presets have been added yet. Verified presets will always show their source and last-checked date.
Completed on-device jobs will appear here when history is enabled.
Use your device palette while keeping validation colours consistent.
Metadata removal, local history, privacy mode and cleanup controls will remain privacy-first defaults.
